summary: test(functional): stop passwordless passkey AAL2 divert test at the divert
description:
Because:
 - The passwordless AAL2 divert test ran 60s+ and timed out: passwordless
   setup pays three email-OTP round-trips, then it completed the full inline
   TOTP enrolment on top.
 - That TOTP-completion tail and the account-AAL2 assertions duplicate the
   cheaper passkey-only divert test, which already covers them.

This commit:
 - Stops the test at the /inline_totp_setup divert (the behaviour unique to
   the passwordless path), matching the cached-session divert test.
 - Drops runtime to ~20s and removes the half-enrolled-TOTP teardown failure.
